experiment: Product B - seed the autotuner (time-first convergence)
env: H100/sm_90 fp32, GPU2+GPU3, cold Triton+inductor cache per run
autotuner: LFBOTreeSearch, quick profile (init_pop=30, copies=2, max_gen=5, from_best_available, pad_random=False)

method.seeded: default; compiler_seed_configs n=1, autotuner_heuristics=['triton_reduction_tile']; seed in gen0

TRAP_seed_degraded_on_injection.finding: On all 4 shapes (rnumel>4096) the seed reduction_loops=[None] (PERSISTENT) is flat-encoded to a looped chunk of 4096. num_warps + block_sizes survive; the persistent lever does NOT.
TRAP_seed_degraded_on_injection.root_cause: ReductionLoopSpec._encode_flat_value maps None->_flat_fragment.default()=min(next_pow2(rnumel),4096); unflatten restores None only if flat_int>=size_hint, which fails for rnumel>4096.
TRAP_seed_degraded_on_injection.codegen_proof: [None] => no for-roffset loop (1 tl.arange); [4096] => has loop (2 tl.arange); genuinely different kernels.
TRAP_seed_degraded_on_injection.scope: autotuner-injection path ONLY; the Product-A bare-seed path (configs=[seed]) preserves [None].
TRAP_seed_degraded_on_injection.implication: Product-B wins below are a LOWER BOUND; faithful injection would widen the early-budget gap.

slice1_same_budget_seeded_advantage_rati._note: unseeded_ms / seeded_ms (>1 => seeded faster), median of 3 seeds

slice2_time_to_target_95pct._note: wall-clock seconds to first reach 95% of unseeded-full-budget perf; speedup = unseeded_t/seeded_t (median of 3 seeds; [min,max])

total_full_search_wallclock_median_s._caveat: seed makes the FULL search LONGER (LFBO explores around the extra good config). Product-B value is time-to-target + early-budget perf, NOT a cheaper full search. The lever is: with a seed you can shrink the budget.

verdict: Seeding shifts the convergence curve UP-and-LEFT on all 4 shapes. Headline time-to-95% win 1.5-1.8x on 3/4 shapes (rms_norm x2, sum); long_sum ~tie on time-to-target but big gen0 win (latencies in ~10us noise floor). Full-budget no-regression holds (seeded>=unseeded everywhere). Achieved with the persistent lever DEGRADED on injection -- fixing the round-trip should widen the early-budget gap.
